data.title: Create scripts/release.sh with sequential precondition gating
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Description
Create scripts/release.sh at repo root (~100-150 lines bash). The script makes RED tests from 4d61-cd7c pass.

## Approach
Inline sequential gating (Proposal A — selected by approach-decision-maker). Each precondition emits a clear named error message before aborting. Uses PATH-injectable structure so existing tests work.

## File to Create
- scripts/release.sh (executable, chmod +x)

## Implementation Steps
1. Parse VERSION argument (semver format validation: MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH)
2. Check: working tree clean (git status --porcelain), on main (git branch --show-current), up-to-date with origin (git status shows not behind)
3. Check: CI green on HEAD — delegate to .claude/scripts/dso ci-status.sh or use gh run list --branch main --limit 1 to get conclusion
4. Check: .claude/scripts/dso validate.sh --ci passes (use shim path — NOT plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh directly, to satisfy check-shim-refs.sh pre-commit hook)
5. Delegate version field updates to plugins/dso/scripts/tag-release.sh <VERSION>
6. Validate .claude-plugin/marketplace.json JSON: python3 -m json.tool .claude-plugin/marketplace.json > /dev/null
7. Prompt for confirmation (read -r) or accept --yes flag — before push
8. Create git tag v<VERSION> and push to origin/main

## Error Message Requirements (each precondition must name itself)
- "ERROR: CI is not green on HEAD — aborting release"
- "ERROR: Working tree is dirty or not up-to-date with origin/main — aborting release"
- "ERROR: Not on main branch — aborting release"
- "ERROR: Not up-to-date with origin/main — aborting release"
- "ERROR: Validation (validate.sh --ci) failed — aborting release"
- "ERROR: marketplace.json would be invalid JSON — aborting release"

## Files to Modify
- .claude-plugin/marketplace.json path: $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.claude-plugin/marketplace.json

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] scripts/release.sh is executable
  Verify: test -x scripts/release.sh
- [ ] scripts/release.sh has valid bash syntax
  Verify: bash -n scripts/release.sh
- [ ] All test-release.sh tests pass (RED→GREEN)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-release.sh
- [ ] Script aborts non-zero with named precondition message for each precondition failure
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-release.sh
- [ ] validate.sh called via .claude/scripts/dso shim (no direct plugins/dso/ path)
  Verify: grep -v 'plugins/dso/scripts/validate' scripts/release.sh
- [ ] marketplace.json path uses .claude-plugin/marketplace.json
  Verify: grep -q '\.claude-plugin/marketplace\.json' scripts/release.sh
